ideation: This animation sequence will depict a classic vampire pose, emphasizing mystery and a touch of menace. The arms will be positioned to enhance the character's allure and slightly threatening presence.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, underscoring the vampire's calculating nature. The first frame will show the arms at the sides, as a relaxed starting point.  The second frame will have one arm raised in a beckoning gesture, while the other remains still. The third frame will show both arms raised in a gesture that suggests either dominance or a subtle threat. The fourth frame will have both arms lowered back to the sides. Frame five will end in a relaxed stance. This will create a sense of anticipation and intrigue.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, a moment of stillness
the left arm beckons slowly, a subtle invitation
both arms rise, a dramatic, commanding gesture
arms fall back to the sides, the threat recedes
settling back into a relaxed, watchful pose
